parsed.production_notes: The top half features an AI-generated robot avatar with slightly unnatural lip-sync and repetitive hand gestures. The bottom half is a human actor recorded in a standard video format.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot with a smooth, white, metallic and plastic exterior. She has a pale face with grey eyes, no hair, and visible mechanical joints on her neck and arms.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; visible white mechanical body panels.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a slim build, medium brown complexion, dark voluminous hair, and a light beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue t-shirt with thin, horizontal white stripes.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, occasionally confused, and eager to learn.

scenes.setting: Top: Cafe interior, daytime. Bottom: Living room, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a humanoid robot with a smooth, white exterior, is positioned in the center of the frame. The robot has a feminine face with pale skin and grey eyes. Its body features visible joints and mechanical parts. The robot's right hand is raised slightly, resting near its chest. The background is a brightly lit cafe interior with large windows showing greenery outside. Hanging spherical lights and a textured wall are visible behind the robot.

Character B is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. He has a slim build, dark hair, and a light beard. He is wearing a light blue striped t-shirt. The background is a softly lit living room. A couch with patterned cushions is visible behind him, along with a framed picture on the wall and warm ambient lighting.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing a video call conversation. The top panel features Character A in a cafe setting, while the bottom panel shows Character B in a living room. Dynamic text overlays appear in the center of the screen, displaying their dialogue and English corrections.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: कल कहाँ गए थे [Where did you go yesterday?]
Character B says: I went to माल yesterday [I went to maal yesterday]
Character A says: माल? प्रोनन्सियेशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. [Maal? The pronunciation is a bit wrong. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday.]
Character A says: कल क्या खाया [What did you eat yesterday?]
Character B says: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat peeja ate.]
Character A says: पीजा? नहीं Pizza! और बात कल की है इसलिए Eat नहीं Ate! I ate pizza! [Peeja? No Pizza! And we are talking about yesterday so not Eat but Ate! I ate pizza!]
Character A says: ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Where do you catch the train from?]
Character B says: I pick train from रेलवे इस्टेशन। [I pick train from railway is-station.]
Character A says: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। ट्रेन उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना और इस्टेशन नहीं Station! I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch and not is-station but Station! I catch the train from the railway station.]
Character B says: ओह... मेरा प्रोनन्सियेशन वीक है। [Oh... my pronunciation is weak.]
Character A says: कोई बात नहीं। AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem. Did you try an AI Teacher?]
Character B says: वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं। नार्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 5 million people are practicing on MySivi.]
Character B says: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.]
Character B says: वाओ, कैसे जॉइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]
Character A says: नीचे इनस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ। MySivi App इनस्टॉल करो, साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगा। [Press the install button below. Install the MySivi App, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Dynamic text overlays showing the dialogue in Hindi and English, such as 'कल कहाँ गए थे', 'I went to माल yesterday', 'It is Mall', 'I ate pizza!', 'Catch मतलब पकड़ना', 'AI Teacher ट्राई', 'MySivi App इनस्टॉल करो'.

scenes.setting: Digital graphic background, then plain light purple background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene begins with a solid dark background. It then transitions to a 3D render of a silver smartphone. The phone is initially shown from the back, highlighting its camera lenses, and then rotates to reveal its blank front screen. The phone is set against a plain, light purple background.

scenes.visual_description: The scene displays a digital promotional graphic for the MySivi app, featuring pricing details and a countdown timer. It then transitions to a 3D animation of a smartphone rotating to show its screen, which displays the app's logo and an install button.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ट्रायल सिर्फ एक रुपये में तीन दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [The trial is for just one rupee for three days. Start now.]
Character A says: इनस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और MySivi App डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi App.]
scenes.on_screen_text: MySivi, Sale Ends Today, सगळं UNLOCK करा (Unlock everything), OFFER ₹30 ₹1, MySivi Pro फायदे (MySivi Pro benefits), २४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher (24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher), तुमचं grammar correct होईल instant feedback सोबत. (Your grammar will be corrected with instant feedback.), Offer ends in 09:58, PhonePe, Start Trial at ₹1, Payments safe आहेत. कधीही Cancel करू शकता. (Payments are safe. Can cancel anytime.), MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
